description: Meat products seed data - raw/uncooked state from USDA FoodData Central

data_sources.name: USDA FoodData Central API
data_sources.note: Data fetched programmatically using official USDA FDC API

verification_instructions.how_to_find: All products verified via USDA FDC API using official API key. External IDs are real FDC IDs.
verification_instructions.status: All data verified from USDA source
